name: Fresh Blueberry-Pecan Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix together the brown sugar, granulated sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
3. Using your fingers, work the butter into the mixture until it is crumbly.
4. Place the blueberries in a buttered baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the crumb mixture over the blueberries.
6. Sprinkle the chopped pecans on top.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the blueberries are bubbly.
8. Serve hot or warm for approximately 7-10 minutes.
